marathon.name: Princess
marathon.bio: Hi humans! My name is Princess. I thought I had a forever home but it just wouldn't stick so I'm back in these kennels once again. Here's what you should know- I'm a sweet and playful girl who deserves the forever kind of love. It's looking like I'll be happiest as the only dog in the home and the jury is still out when it comes to me having any future friendships with cats. I think we'll have to learn the rest about each other as we go- are you in?!

marathon.name: Verdi
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Verdi! I'm a fun loving lady that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call home, and let me tell you - I'm a little picky! I'm a diva, and I'm not afraid to say it. I'm not a big fan of being picked up or held, but will curl up in your lap on my own terms - I just like to be in charge. I love to be spoiled and would be best as an only pet. If you think I could be the diva of my dreams then come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Bunyan Burger
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Bunyan Burger and boy am I ready for you to adopt ME! I'm a chunky lady on a journey to lose some weight, and I hope to do that in my new home! I'm a sweet girl that is a little shy at first but soon we will be besties! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Ivy
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Ivy! I'm a fun loving girl that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call home. I'm very playful, adorable and ready to be YOURS! Come see me soon!*Ivy is currently being fostered at the Starry Night Cat Cafe in Stevens Point. For more information on meeting with Ivy please visit https://www.starrynightcatcafe.com/visit

marathon.name: Thia
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Thia! I'm a sweet girl that came to HSMC after being found as a stray. I'm a very loving girl that loves people and that would be a purrfect fit in any home! Come visit me soon!*Thia is currently being fostered at the Starry Night Cat Cafe in Stevens Point. For more information on meeting with Thia please visit https://www.starrynightcatcafe.com/visit

marathon.name: Pablo
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Pablo! I'm a sweet boy that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call home. I'm active, playful and super loving so you should come meet soon! I've lived with another cat before and done well so I think I could again! Come visit me soon!*Pablo is currently being fostered at the Starry Night Cat Cafe in Stevens Point. For more information on meeting with Pablo please visit https://www.starrynightcatcafe.com/visit

marathon.name: Toshara
marathon.bio: They call me Toshara and tell me I'm the sweetest senior feline you'll ever meet. I turned myself into the shelter after life on the streets was getting to be too lonely and I have a feeling that you just might be my greatest adventure yet. I'm a mellow gal who enjoys the company of other cats, window seats and chin scratches. Do you have room in your lap for me?*Toshara is currently being fostered at the Starry Night Cat Cafe in Stevens Point. For more information on meeting with Toshara please visit https://www.starrynightcatcafe.com/visit

marathon.name: Louie
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Louie! I'm a sweet boy that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call my own. I'm a great cat that has lived with other cats before and done well. I play lots with my toys and would love an active, playful family! Come visit me soon!*Louie is currently being fostered at the Starry Night Cat Cafe in Stevens Point. For more information on meeting with Louie please visit https://www.starrynightcatcafe.com/visit

marathon.name: Smokey Jo
marathon.bio: Well hello there, my name is Smokey Jo. Do you need a hug? I have been told that not only am I handsome, but I give the best hugs around. Come down to the shelter and tell me your thoughts on my hugs.

marathon.name: Princess
marathon.bio: Woof! My name is Princess and I'm a girlie with quick wit and the bluest eyes this side of the Mississippi. I'm social with other dogs but do not want to share high value items. I see cats as prey and not as friends so a feline-free home would be best for me. I'm independent but sweet and looking to be out of the shelter and into your home. Have you been searching for a girl like me?

marathon.name: Honesty
marathon.bio: I've had about enough of life lately. I've seen other dogs come and go and I've waited patiently, but the light and the hope inside of my heart has dimmed a little bit more each time. I'm not telling you this so that you'll feel bad for me, I'm just sharing my truth and hoping the right person hears it; they don't call me Honesty for nothin'. I often lay awake at night wondering what a life outside of the kennel environment would look and feel like. I've thought often about the friends I could make, the places I could sniff, the adventures that await me...but in these four walls I wait. I'm not the kind of dog that does well with waiting around, I'm the kind of dog that needs a purpose. The kind of dog that needs work to do. The kind of dog that needs an experienced handler and a busy schedule. The kind of dog that was never meant for a life in a kennel.Less

marathon.name: Juggle *Barn Cat*
marathon.bio: I'm not a lap cat, I'm a working cat and there's a difference. I want to be outside in my element, hunting for food and keeping your shed or barn free of mice and other pests. Do you have a job for me?

marathon.name: Puck *Barn Cat*
marathon.bio: My name is Puck and I'm hoping to get back to the only life I've ever known, wild and free. If you're looking for a working cat for your barn or shop, you know where to find me!

marathon.name: Jake
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Jake! I'm looking for a new place to call my home! I'm a quiet guy that takes a little bit of time to warm up to you but soon we will be best of friends! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Pippa
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Pippa! I'm a sweet girl that is here at HSMC hoping to find my forever home. In my last home I was one of around 30 cats total. I know, so many! Anyways, I'm very good with other cats and would likely blossom in a home with them again. However, I can be a little shy when you first meet me probably just because I'm not used to getting so much one on one attention, but soon we will be the very best of friends! Come visit me soon!*Pippa is currently being fostered at the Starry Night Cat Cafe in Stevens Point. For more information on meeting with Pippa please visit https://www.starrynightcatcafe.com/visit

marathon.name: Smudgie
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Smudgie! I'm a sweet boy that is looking for a new place to call my home. I'm a great cat that is used to living with lots of other cats, but I think I'd like to be part of a smaller family than the 30 plus I used to. I'm outgoing, friendly and so ready to be adopted! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Canteen
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Canteen! I'm a sweet boy that came to HSMC after being found as a stray. And boy, did the staff here have quite the shock when they realized that not all of my tail had come with me! Yes, I had to have it amputated after arrival and now I just have the cutest little nub. Or at least that's what they tell me! I'm a happy guy that loves people and just can't wait to be YOURS!

marathon.name: Hex
marathon.bio: Hello darlin', what brings you round these parts? I hope you're here because you're looking for a friend because I could really use one, too. My name is Hex and I hear that this is the place where dogs come to start over and I could really use a refresh. I'm a happy, high energy girl who is used to being the only pet and the center of attention. Don't get me wrong, I can be social when it comes to other pets, I just don't want to share my human or my home with them. I have some fitness goals I'd like to reach this year in addition to adopting a family; I'm really reaching for the stars here. The long and short of it is that I'm a really good girl and I've been well loved but things changed and I'm on a different path now. One that I hope leads me straight to you.

marathon.name: Ryn
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Ryn! I'm a sweet girl that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call home. I'm a very loving girl but I can be a little shy with new people. Not much is known about me before I came to HSMC as I was a stray but staff do know I have a rather unique look to me. As you can tell, one of my pupils are very different than the other. Don't worry though, I'm still very active, playful and loving! It doesn't change a single thing about me. If you think I could be the gal for you come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Kelen
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Kelen! I'm a handsome guy that is here at HSMC looking for a new home. I have to say life wasn't kind to me before I came. I was living outside for the first few years of my life, being attacked by other animals and having no one to care for me. I came to HSMC after I was in need of desperate medical care and now I'm all healed up and ready to go home! I'm kind of a staff favorite here, as I love to talk and cuddle. I'm happiest when I'm being held or in someone's lap getting lots of love and attention. I'm a little purr machine and I will make any home brighter once I'm in it. If you think I could be the cat for you then come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Hank
marathon.bio: Hi, my name is Hank, and I am a tank.I like to rub on things to make them mine, but to share with you would be just fine. So lets be friends, and look through a shared lens. I love to be brushed, but your lap might be crushed. Come take me home, make sure you have a comb.

marathon.name: Noodles
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Noodles! Now, let's get the elephant in the room outta the way. I only have one eye! Yes, I know, it's a little disconcerting but I promise I'm doing much better without it then I ever did with it! I'm a very outgoing cat that absolutely loves people and would be a purrfect fit in any home! I'm great with other cats and would just love a home with lots of time to play and snuggle with me! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Emmie
marathon.bio: Be honest, have you ever seen a happier gal?! My name is Emmie and things are finally starting to look up for me. Life on the streets was pretty lonely and uncertain. I didn't have a place to call home or humans to call my family; I didn't want to get close to anyone and always had my guard up. Coming to the shelter helped me tear down all of the walls I had spent months building; even I don't recognize the dog I used to be. And now that I've healed myself, I'm ready to love you. My age is as golden as my coat and I'm looking for a quiet retirement home that never runs out of head scratches, keeps the treat jar full and tells me I'm beautiful every single day. I'm ok to share my home with a low key dogs or cats and hoping that you will make the rest of my life, the best of my life.Less

marathon.name: Honey
marathon.bio: I heard ya'll were looking to grow your family by four paws and I'm hoping to be the lucky dog you choose. I'm a high energy girlie who is playful, curious and downright adorable. I'm social with other dogs but will need my food, treats and high value items kept separate. I'm looking for an active lifestyle with adventure around every corner and in return I'll love you like no dog ever has. Wanna shake on it?

marathon.name: Cooley *Barn Cat*
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Cooley! I'm a pretty girl that is looking for a new working job! If you have pests you want gone the natural way...adopt me!

marathon.name: Rocky
marathon.bio: Woof! My name is Rocky and a little trouble never looked so good. I was causing a bit of a ruckus in my last neighborhood but my days of raising hell are behind me and I'm ready to be the best dog you've ever had. I'm a big boy at 90lbs but am the perfect mix of playful with a dash of chill. I LOVE other dogs and tend to be a follower (not a leader). Cats are new to me but something I think I could learn to love. I'm tolerant, sweet and at times a bull in a china shop (I don't know my own size)! What do you say we blow this popsicle stand?!

marathon.name: Mailbox *Barn Cat*
marathon.bio: Ready to send a love letter to your next barn cat? Well, I'm Mailbox and I'm ready to catch all of your mice!

marathon.name: Figaro
marathon.bio: In a kennel at the shelter is no place for a senior sweetie like me. My name is Figaro and I'm a mature guy at 12 years old. My hobbies include lounging in sun puddles, bird watching, lap snuggling and naps. I'm cat friendly, too! If you've got a chill vibe and room in your heart to love a senior cat, I'm your guy.*Figaro is currently being fostered at the Starry Night Cat Cafe in Stevens Point. For more information on meeting with Figaro please visit https://www.starrynightcatcafe.com/visit

marathon.name: Murray
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Murray! I'm a handsome guy that is here at HSMC looking for a new home. I'm a great cat that came from a home that just had wayyyyyyyyyy too many of us cats. So now I'm looking for a calmer home where I can get more attention devoted to me. I'd be great in a home with other cats and am very outgoing and friendly. Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Posey
marathon.bio: They call me Posey and let's just say that if the shelter were the nursing home, I'd be the one in the glasses at the far table who wasn't interested in socializing until the Bingo game was over. I'm in my granny era and I hope you're here for it. I'm looking for a quiet home where I can ignore the other pets and sometimes the people, too. What can I say? I'm an independent girlie who likes attention on my terms and I'll say it, I have a bit of an attitude. I may have also lost patience for small children but my cloudy eyes will search for you in every room.

marathon.name: Valencia
marathon.bio: My name is Valencia and I'm just a good dog. I'm soft and gentle, with the sweetest brown eyes you've ever seen. I'm playful (self-proclaimed connoisseur of stuffed toys) and attention seeking while still being mild mannered and polite. I'm social with other dogs and respectful of their space when they need it. Cats don't bother me one bit and I know a few basic commands, too! I'm like the perfect dog starter pack- the only thing missing is a place to call home and a family to love!

marathon.name: Hedgewitch
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Hedgewitch! I'm a sweet girl that came to HSMC as a stray. When I first got here I was oh so scared of everything and everyone but HSMC staff helped me see that people are not all that bad. I'm still very shy with new people, but I know with a proper chance I can find the purrfect forever home for me!

marathon.name: Fortune *Bonded Pair*
marathon.bio: My name is Fortune and if you ask me, I'd say your luck is about to change. I'm the mother in a mother/daughter pair and we're hoping to find our new home together; it's all we've ever known. Sure, we have our tiffs and don't always see eye to eye, but family is all you have in this world and we'll always have each other's backs. I like to keep my circle small and am a little hesitant when it comes to meeting new people but I know that in order to get out of the shelter, I have to get out of my shell. I can be social with other dogs when I'm one on one but may be a little more stand-offish when Buttercup is around. I'm not interested in sharing my home with cats and I have had some interaction with children. I struggled to adjust to the shelter when I first got here and I'm sure there'll be a few growing pains in the process of meeting and moving in with a new family, but I'm going to try my hardest to be brave, bold and beautiful.Less

marathon.name: Twy
marathon.bio: Hey there, you can call me Twy! When I'm not serving customers at Café Tropical, you'll find me at HSMC looking for a new family! I'm just a small town girl with a sweet personality and big dreams. I'm social, patient and great at making new friends- just ask David and Alexis! See you soon?

marathon.name: Sassy
marathon.bio: Where are all of my strong, independent girlies at? My name is Sassy and it fits; I like to keep my inner circle small and would prefer to be your one and only. I've had my fair share of homes and transitions so I'm hoping to find the one that sticks. Adventurous adults are my vibe, small children or dogs that share my home not so much. I know my forever is out there and I just can't wait to find it.

marathon.name: Valestin
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Valestin! I'm a handsome guy that wandered his way into HSMC after going on an adventure. I've decided it's time to settle down and find a family to call my own, so please adopt me! I'm playful, outgoing and ready to be yours! Let's adventure together!

marathon.name: Nutella
marathon.bio: My name is Nutella and I just want you to know that I'm trying my very best to be brave. I've taken it slow and steady on the road to adoption and I can't wait until it leads me home to you. I'm mostly overwhelmed in the shelter environment and have been very timid and shy. Staff have been patient and I hope that you will be, too. I would do best in a quiet home where I can be myself and truly blossom. I don't think I would mind the company of other cats or a lazy dog. Maybe you can make all of my dreams come true?

marathon.name: Mia
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Mia! I'm a sweet girl that was surrendered to HSMC due to no fault of my own. There were just too many of us felines in the home! I'm a quiet girl that loves attention and would make an excellent fit in just about any home! I'd be a great fit in a home with other cats as well! Come visit me soon!*Mia is currently being fostered at the Starry Night Cat Cafe in Stevens Point. For more information on meeting with Mia please visit https://www.starrynightcatcafe.com/visit

marathon.name: Blu
marathon.bio: My name is Blu and I'm looking for a fresh start. My life has taken some unexpected turns and I'm in the camp that says it's about the destination and not journey. Here's to hoping that all of the roads I've traveled thus far will lead me straight to you. I'm a smart and confident guy who is selective when it comes to other dogs and should not be placed with small dogs or cats. I know a handful of tricks that I'll gladly show you in exchange for a treat and I'm looking forward to the long walks and talks we'll share. I can't wait to love everything about you.

marathon.name: Ice Rink *Barn Cat*
marathon.bio: Are you looking for a barn cat? My name is Ice Rink and I am in search of a working home! You can apply for me today.

marathon.name: Hockey Stick *Barn Cat*
marathon.bio: Looking for a great mouser? I could be the cat for you! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Paddy
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Paddy! I'm a handsome guy that is here at HSMC looking for a new family to call my own. I'm quite the funny guy, always getting into some sort of trouble and making the staff laugh. I love to be around people and would love a family that has lots of time for me. Come visit me soon!*Paddy is currently being fostered at the Starry Night Cat Cafe in Stevens Point. For more information on meeting with Paddy please visit https://www.starrynightcatcafe.com/visit

marathon.name: Raven
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Raven! I'm a sweet boy that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call home. I was part of a hoarding situation and boy do I like having more space to myself. I'd still be great with other cats but at a lesser level of them. I can be a little shy at first but soon we will be the best of friends!

marathon.name: Jojo
marathon.bio: My name is Jojo and I'm so easy to love. My story took a few twists and turns before landing me at the shelter and looking for a new home but I think this is the best place for me. The other dogs in the kennel tell me that this is where dogs come to get adopted and gosh, that just sounds like a wonderful thing. I'm a sucker for attention, a big fan of belly rubs and other pets aren't a problem for me. The best part? I'll fit perfectly in your lap and I'll never leave your heart.

marathon.name: Terracotta
marathon.bio: HI there, I'm Terracotta! I'm a sweet girl that is here at HSMC as a stray. I'm a great cat that loves attention but can be a little shy until I get to know you! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Buttercup *Bonded Pair*
marathon.bio: Hellllooooo out there! My name is Buttercup and there are a few things you should know before you fall in love with me. 1. I'm a package deal- I was surrendered to the shelter with my mom and when I leave here, I'm taking her with me. 2. I tend to be a little on the dramatic side and am not afraid to cause a scene. 3. Cats are not my friends, I cannot go to a home with cats. 4. This is the face that could be greeting you every time you come home...

marathon.name: Willa
marathon.bio: They call me Willa and tell me that I'm a special girl who deserves the world, but my troubled past makes me doubt that's true. I was on my own for at least 2.5 weeks before getting trapped and brought to the shelter; it's hard to go through something like that and not have trust issues. Getting to the adoption floor has been a long time coming and I'm thankful for the staff who got me here but I'm ready for bigger and better things with someone who's love is true and won't give up when the going gets tough. I love wide open spaces, water, fetch, jolly balls and the wind in my fur. Once I know and trust you, you'll see the side of me that gets lost in the stress of the shelter and the uncertainty of a constantly changing environment. I don't love other dogs and I don't give my heart away easily but I promise I'm worth the time and the energy. (Oh and breed experience is a big plus in my book!)Less

marathon.name: Soul
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Soul! I'm a loving girl that is here to spin you a tune and make you love me. And you wanna know a fun fact about me? I have NO tail! Yep, that's right, I have no tail whatsoever aren't I so special? I'm a great cat that loves people and am super snuggly. Come visit me soon at the City of Schofield Municipal Center!

marathon.name: Bandita
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Bandita! I'm a super adorable gal that is here and ready to be adopted into my forever home! I'm a great cat that gets along well with other cats and would be a purrfect fit in just about any home! Come visit me soon!*Bandita is currently being fostered at the Starry Night Cat Cafe in Stevens Point. For more information on meeting with Bandita please visit https://www.starrynightcatcafe.com/visit

marathon.name: Siridean
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Siridean! I'm a sweet girl that made her way to HSMC as a stray. But, I know I'll soon be leaving with my forever family! I'm petite, adorable and ready to move in with you! Come visit me soon!*Siridean is currently being fostered at the Starry Night Cat Cafe in Stevens Point. For more information on meeting with Siridean please visit https://www.starrynightcatcafe.com/visit

marathon.name: Remi
marathon.bio: Hey good lookin'! I'm a southern belle allllll the way from Baton Rouge, Louisiana and I'm in a kennel at your shelter hoping to steal your heart. Don't worry, I didn't make the trip alone. My friend Misa is here too and boy, would it be the bees knees if we could find our forever, together. Here's the thing, I like to keep my inner circle small and Misa already has a place there but I'm also prepared to venture out on my own. I'm high energy and high prey drive so no cats for me! The shelter environment has been stressful for me so I'm hoping my stay here will be short but our happiness together will be lifelong. See you soon?

marathon.name: Stitch
marathon.bio: Do you sew? How about crochet? Are you good with some kind of stitching? My name is Stitch and even if you aren't into those things you might be interested in me. I am a sweet girl that wants to sit on your shoulder and maybe help you count while you do your crafting. Come down to the shelter and meet me, see you soon.

marathon.name: Misa
marathon.bio: You look like someone who likes to have FUN and well, that's one thing we already have in common! My name is Misa and I'm looking for a place to call home and a family to love. I'm a high energy girl who is ready to take the world by storm. I'm selective when it comes to other dogs (but my bestie Remi is here and I like her) and may be a bit much for a home with cats. I love feeling the fresh air in my fur and having my favorite human at my side. See you soon?

marathon.name: String Cheese *Barn Cat*
marathon.bio: Hi friends! My name is String Cheese and I'm hoping you pull me away from the shelter and put me to work at your shed or barn. I'm used to fending for myself and would be happy to take care of the rodent control on your property.

marathon.name: Wovey
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Wovey! I'm a sweet girl that came to HSMC as a stray, but I won't be here for much longer! When you first meet me you might think me meek and mild, but once you get to know me I'm full of pep and energy! I love to run around playing with tennis balls and getting the zoomies - so expect to be kept on your toes! If you think a wild girl like me could bring joy into your home then come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Mohawk
marathon.bio: Woof! My name is Mohawk and I'm hoping to stand out from all of the other dogs in the kennel. I'm a sweet and bold pup that can't wait to start my next (and best) adventure with someone like Y-O-U! I'm social with other pets, curious about life and up for anything. I have a feeling that you and I could stand out from the crowd!

clark.name: Harvey
clark.bio: Meet Harvey! Harvey came to CCHS from a local farm earlier this August. This handsome Heeler mix is just about a year old and weighs roughly 41.6lbs currently. Harvey is a shining pup with a smile to match! He is as sweet as can be, though he can start out a little timid at times. Harvey is a smart guy, just waiting to figure out all of life's puzzles and snufflemats! He would benefit from an active furever home that can help burn some of that remaining puppy energy! Harvey gets a little nervous around small children and would much prefer a home with older children that know how to respect his space. While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% your newest front seat co-pilot! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Harvey today!

clark.name: Willow
clark.bio: Meet Willow! Willow came to CCHS as a stray from the Loyal area towards the beginning of August. This sweet gal is about 1 year old and weighs roughly 48.3lbs currently. Willow is an absolute sweetheart! She can be a little on the timid side, as coming into a shelter setting can be quite daunting to some pups, but with a few treats, positive encouragement, and a whole lotta forehead kissies and she will warm up in no time! Willow is currently working on her leash manners as she can tend to get a little excitable when she catches a new scent! She would benefit from having a patient furever family that is willing to meet her where she is at with all of her little quirks! Willow would also benefit from being the only dog in her furever home as she can have a bit of anxiety around other dogs. While we may not be entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she's 100% a good girl! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Willow today!

clark.name: Missy (Adoption Fee Sponsored!)
clark.bio: Meet Missy! Missy came to CCHS as a stray a couple of times in November, and after being reclaimed the first time, her owners decided to not reclaim her when she came in the second time after multiple attempts to contact them. This sweet girl is about 5 years and 8 months old and weighs roughly 42.4lbs currently. Missy is a total baby! She may have some scars, but we assure you this sweet girl is nothing but smiles and tail wags when it comes to being loved on! We can't guarantee perfection as this big baby as seen some things, but with a gentle hand and a bit of patience we can guarantee undying love and loyalty! Missy has been known to do well with other dogs but will need a meet and greets on site to make sure the pups approve of each other before making that journey home. We aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, but we can tell you she is 100% Snuggable House Hippo! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Missy today!

clark.name: Bart
clark.bio: Meet Bart! Bart came to CCHS with his 7 siblings towards the very end of December from a local farm, and is now the last of the bunch looking for his furever home. This lively Heeler mix is about 21 weeks old and weighs roughly 18lbs currently. Bart is such a goofball! He can be a little awkward in his approach but he's hoping his adorable looks can distract you from that! While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% North American Look-at-Dem-Ears! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success to the pup. Apply for Bart today!

clark.name: Darla (Adoption Fee Sponsored!)
clark.bio: Meet Darla! Darla came to CCHS as a stray from the township of Fremont earlier this January. This pretty Red Heeler is about a year and a half old and weighs roughly 35.2lbs currently. Darla is an absolute ray of awkward sunshine! She is such a smart gal but didn't quite grasp onto the social skills so she hopes you can look past her being a bit forward with her affection! Darla is a tad protective of her food, so she'd prefer being the only dog in the home to avoid her anxiety around sharing. With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Darla today!

clark.name: Tamara
clark.bio: Meet Tamara! Tamara came to CCHS with her sister Tia as strays from the Loyal area earlier this February. This darling gal is about 14 weeks old and weighs roughly 14lbs currently. Tamara is a little bit of a bashful gal! She isn't always certain that she wants to make new friends, but she always ends up loving anyone who shows her attention anyhow! While we aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she is 100% Cutie-Patootie! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Tamara today!

clark.name: Patty
clark.bio: Meet Patty! Patty came to CCHS with her 4 kittens towards the beginning of March as strays from the Greenwood area. This quirky Tabby is about a year old and weighs roughly 7lbs currently. Patty is a bit of an odd gal! She always looks so surprised with her big eyes! If you're looking for a cat that will have you second guessing your every move with a side eye, Patty is the one for you! Her interesting aura will draw you in and have you both in awe and mild confusion as to how you ended up with such a goofy cat! Apply for Patty today!

clark.name: Oscar (Adoption Fee Sponsored!)
clark.bio: Meet Oscar! Oscar came to CCHS as an owner surrender after his owner had unfortunately passed. This handsome mixed breed is about 2 years old and weighs roughly 55.6lbs currently. Oscar is a total goofball! He admittedly will do just about anything to be told he's a good boy! We aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, but we can tell you he is 100% North American House Hippo! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Oscar today!

clark.name: Thor
clark.bio: Meet Thor! Thor came to CCHS as an owner surrender after his owner had to take on caring for their family member. This handsome Red Heeler mix is about 1 year old and weighs roughly 28.5lbs currently. Thor is a total loverboy! He has a friendly demeanor and is down for any adventure! Thor would benefit from an active family that can help burn off some of that energy he has! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Thor today!

clark.name: Einstein (Adoption Fee Sponsored!)
clark.bio: Meet Einstein! Einstein came to CCHS as an owner surrender after the owner's living situation changed and they could no longer provide for him. This handsome Doodle is about 8 years old and weighs roughly 93.5lbs currently. Einstein is a charming fellow! He still has his wits about him in his older age and is looking for a furever family that understands that only a lot of nonsense will be tolerated! This dapper guy loves to stay active and would benefit from a furever family that shares his love for adventure! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Einstein today!

clark.name: Honey
clark.bio: Meet Honey! Honey came into CCHS as an owner surrender earlier this April after her owner was finding it difficult to keep up with her care. This beautiful Poodle mix is about 8 months old and weighs roughly 37.2lbs currently. Honey is as sweet as her name suggests! She has a constant wag in her tail and smile across her face; she just can't wait to find her furever family to share her joy with! We can't say we know for certain what her exact breed makeup is, but we can tell you she is 100% Northern Wisconsin Smiling Snuggler! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Honey today!

clark.name: Freddie Purrcury
clark.bio: Meet Freddie Purrcury! Freddie Purrcury came to CCHS as an owner surrender after his owner felt that they could not dedicate enough time to him. This 1-year-old, handsome man is dapper in his Tuxedo coat, weighing in at a whopping 12.6lbs. Freddie Purrcury is a bit of a timid man! He's been quite stressed here at the shelter, but one thing that has been bringing him ease is being around the other cats in Kitty City! We feel Freddie would benefit from a patient furever family that already have cats, or that are willing to take on another cat with Freddie; luckily our cat adoptions are always Two for One! Freddie is currently residing in our Kitty City wall kennels. Apply for Freddie Purrcury today!

clark.name: River
clark.bio: Meet River! River came to CCHS earlier this April from a local farm. This gorgeous Chow mix is about 11 months old and weighs roughly 44ls currently. River is the sweetest lovergirl with the friendliest demeanor! She has a constant wagging tail and will try to steal as many kisses as you'll let her! River would benefit from a furever family that understands her grooming and stimulation needs. While we aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she is 100% Embodiment of a Ray of Sunshine! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for River today!

clark.name: Oreo
clark.bio: Meet Oreo! Oreo came to CCHS as an owner surrender with 2 other cats after their owner decided that their home was no longer the safest place for them. This handsome guy is about 4 and a half years old and weighs roughly 8.8lbs at the moment. Oreo is such a curious sweetheart! He loves to be doted on, but he knows to mind his manners, so he'll happily wait his turn for attention! Oreo is overall a happy-go-lucky, chill guy! He is currently residing in our Kitty City with a number of feline friends. Apply for Oreo today!

clark.name: Tuff
clark.bio: Meet Tuff! Tuff came to CCHS as an owner surrender with another dog, after their owner's health started making it difficult to keep up with them and their care. This handsome guy is about 7 years old and weighs roughly 70.5lbs currently. Tuff is a high-spirited pup that is ready to be loyal to anyone who gives him treats and tells him he's handsome! He would benefit from an active, but patient furever home that's willing to meet him where he's at in life! Tuff can be a little hesitant when meeting with new men, but with a slow introduction he is sure to be besties with just about anyone! While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you that he is 100% Soft-Coated House Hippo! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Tuff today!

clark.name: Lea
clark.bio: Meet Lea! Lea came to CCHS as an owner surrender with another dog, after their owner's health started making it difficult to keep up with them and their care. This gentle Great Pyrenees mix is about 5 years old and weighs roughly 94.7lbs currently. Lea is a gentle giant through and through! She's got a sweetness to her soul that is almost magnetic! Lea would benefit from a furever family that understands her breed's grooming and exercise needs. We aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, but we can tell you she is 100% Great Gal! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Lea today!

clark.name: Smokey
clark.bio: Meet Smokey! Smokey came to CCHS as an owner surrender with 2 other cats after their owner decided that their home was no longer the safest place for them. This handsome guy is about 4 and a half years old and weighs roughly 12.1lbs currently. Smokey is a bit of a bashful boy! He has the most gorgeous blue eyes, but it takes a few pats before he'll around and bat them at you! Smokey has a very friendly demeanor, so while he doesn't always seek out affection first, he'll never turn it away! Smokey is currently residing in our Kitty City with a multitude of other feline friends. Apply for Smokey today!

clark.name: Venus
clark.bio: Meet Venus! Venus came to CCHS as an owner surrender with 2 other cats after their owner decided that their home was no longer the safest place for them. This beautiful gal is about 4 and a half years old and weighs roughly 9lbs currently. Venus is a bit of a sheepish gal! She has been a little stressed since getting to the shelter and has taken to self-regulating herself in Kitty City. However, once you find her hideout she is more than happy to welcome the attention! Venus would benefit from a furever family that understands that she will need a little time for her personality to blossom. Venus is currently residing in our Kitty City with a multitude of other feline friends. Apply for Venus today!

clark.name: Tiny
clark.bio: Meet Tiny! Tiny came to CCHS as an owner surrender, previously set to be a barn cat however a little bit of wobble in her step had the owner bringing her over to us. This itty-bitty bashful gal is about 11 months old and weighs roughly 4.4lbs currently. Tiny is a sweet gal who is just a little unsure of things! She wasn't given a lot of socialization so she is the teeniest timid, but one thing for certain is that she looooves affection! She does not always know how to ask for it, but with a gentle touch and a little patience, she's very easy to win over. Tiny currently resides in our Kitty City with a number of other feline friends. Apply for Tiny today!

clark.name: Soup
clark.bio: Meet Soup! Soup came to CCHS with her 2 siblings towards the very beginning of April from a local farm. This gorgeous Heeler mix is about 10 weeks old and weighs roughly 16.1lbs currently. Soup has a friendly demeanor and a smile that doesn't quit! She loves to be where the people are and will pull out all the stops to keep the snuggles going for as long as possible! We aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, but we can tell you she is 100% Life of the Party! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Soup today!

clark.name: Stew
clark.bio: Meet Stew! Stew came to CCHS with his 2 sisters at the very beginning of this April from a local farm. This handsome Heeler mix is about 10 weeks old and weighs roughly 18.2lbs currently. Stew is a confident little man! He's got that typical Heeler 'tude, but he's hoping his good looks can help you see past that! We aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, but we can tell you he is 100% Project Manager! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Stew today!

clark.name: Mia
clark.bio: Meet Mia! Mia came to CCHS as a stray from the Neillsville area towards the very beginning of April. This beautiful Diluted Tortie is about 1 year old and weighs roughly 7.6lbs currently. Mia is a total sweetheart! She has such a friendly demeanor and loves to nuzzle her noggin into any and every person she can! Mia is currently residing in our front office while she waits for her furever family. Apply for Mia today!

clark.name: Skipper (Bonded w/Lovey)
clark.bio: Meet Skipper! Skipper originally came to CCHS as a stray with his littermates as teeny, little babies way back in October of last year before he and his sister Lovey were adopted out together in January of this year. They ended up having to make their way back to our facility after their adopters developed some pretty severe allergies to them. This handsome tabby spotted guy is about 6 months old and weighs roughly 8.5lbs currently. Skipper is such a friendly feline! He seeks out attention like it's his day job and isn't afraid to chirp at you if he thinks you're walking away too fast! Skipper is bonded with his sister Lovey and will need to go into his furever home with her, but luckily our cat adoptions are always two for the price of one! Skipper and Lovey currently reside in our Kitty City with our other free-roaming cats. Apply for Skipper and Lovey today!

adams.name: Midnight
adams.bio: Midnight is a 1-year-old tabby with movie-star looks and a velvety-soft coat you have to feel to believe. She’s playful, curious, and always ready to chase a toy like it’s her full-time job.This girl loves affection and will happily soak up attention, on her terms, of course. Midnight appreciates a slow introduction to other cats and a home that understands she sometimes needs her space. If she’s feeling overwhelmed or doesn’t want to be bothered, she may make a quick exit - but give her patience and kindness, and you’ll see just how incredibly sweet she truly is.She’s equal parts fun and tender, with a dash of diva charm. If you’re looking for a soft, playful companion who will keep you entertained and then curl up for love, Midnight might just be your perfect match.Less

adams.name: Maisie
adams.bio: Meet MaisieThis 2-year-old tabby is a certified social butterfly! She absolutely will make herself at home in your lap, your heart, and probably your business, too. Maisie is as sweet as they come, a professional snuggler, and always down for a little playtime when the mood strikes.She’s got that perfect mix of affectionate and independent. She’d do great with other kitties who know how to mind their own business and coexist like civilized adults (read: stay in their own lane).If you’re looking for a cat who brings love and a lot of personality, Maisie is ready to move in and run your house (lovingly, of course)!Less

adams.name: Torve
adams.bio: Torve and Crowe are looking for a patient, loving home.About Torve:This torbie (tortoiseshell/tabby) may be a little shy at first, but give her a moment (and a gentle hand) and she absolutely melts. Once she knows you’re a friend, Torve loves to be petted. And her fur? Truly some of the softest you’ll ever touch.Torve is a quiet sweetheart who would thrive in a calm, loving home where she can settle in at her own pace and be adored like the precious little sweetie pie she is.Note: She is bonded to Crowe and they must be adopted as a pair.Less

adams.name: Crowe
adams.bio: Crowe and Torve are looking for a patient, loving home.About Crowe:He can be a little shy at first and might even talk back while he’s figuring things out, but don’t be fooled! Once he feels safe, he really enjoys affection and gentle attention. He’s the kind of cat who comes out of his shell with kindness and turns into a sweet, loving companion.If you’re looking for a young cat with personality, a soft heart, and a quiet appreciation for cuddles, Crowe might be your perfect match.Note: He is bonded to Torve and they must be adopted as a pair.Less

lincoln.name: Mouse
lincoln.bio: Meet Mouse! She is a nice girl who can be shy at first but is a real sweetheart once she is comfortable! She is great with other cats and would be great in a calmer home!

fetch.name: Gretzky
fetch.bio: Ello again...In case you forgot, I'm Gretzky. I've been in foster care for a long time now and I've really got a good schedule down. I'll tell you about it if you want....First I wake up and am excited to go potty outside. It's one of my favorite times and I may bark or nip your butt with excitement. Don't worry, I'm not /that/ excited. I just really have to pee.Then I come inside and lay on my beddy. It's my favorite spot. Unfortunately, I'm what my foster calls 'a babe magnet.' This means my canine and feline roommates will come to snuggle in my beddy with me, even in very warm temperatures. I don't understand it either. So we spend the next several hours rotating beddies until lunch, when we go back outside.Much sleeping is had. And snacks.Then the garage door opens and my room mates and I loose our collective minds because foster M'mam is home! I love her.And it means we get to do the best thing ever: walkies. I love pooping when I'm on a leash. I love walking. I don't need to smell anything, I don't care. I just like to walk. Especially in the woods!Sometimes we will see people on our walk. It makes me very nervous. Sometimes they will ask to pet me. I tell them 'No Thank You' by desperately trying to get away from them. Then I am edgy the rest of the walk. What if they secretly pop out of a bush to pet me?? Sometimes my foster M'mam will lock me in the bathroom and pet me. I've gotten used to this strange habit, but I don't really like it.Then, after food smells (someti

fetch.name: Mars
fetch.bio: Hello! Miss Mars here, already begging you for more attention! I absolutely love pets and scratches and cuddles. I’m a big ol’ couch hippo and I’d love to watch all of your favorite shows with you, especially if there’s going to be snackies. Give me something to chew on and I swear I won’t go for your shoes, pinky promise. Unless you leave me home alone, unkenneled, then I might have a little taste. What?! Don’t knock it until you try it!As much as I have enjoyed my time with my foster sister, I want to be the star so if you have another dog, it’s just not meant to be. Kitties are chill though! I’ve been in foster care for most of my life, and while I’ve loved my time with my foster fam, I’m really want to find my forever person. Come meet me and let’s play! I’ll even show you a trick or two!You can apply for me at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt

fetch.name: Milo
fetch.bio: Hey, hey! Milo here- just wanted to check in and see how everyone is doing?My life is going pretty dang great, however I am missing one thing. It’s a family to call my own! My last mom owned me since I was just a puppy until now. She could no longer care for me so I found myself as an orphan… I wasn't socialized much as a young pup so I am more of a one or two person kind of dog.I am up for any adventure that involves just spending time with me! I love laying on the couch watching Netflix, a good football game or a nice long walk. I found myself stuck to my foster mom like her little shadow, but she has lots of other shadows too so I want to find my own family.I get along with all dogs as long as they are respectful of my age and size, I don't mind cats at all either. Fast moving kids will not be my thing, they are just so unpredictable and loud. I love to be cuddled and snuggled. Sleeping under the covers is a must as my hair is so fine I get cold easily. I have mastered this potty thing and haven't had accidents in weeks now! I am off leash trained but only to my one or two special humans.If you think you could be one of my special humans- apply for me today!You can apply for me at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt

fetch.name: Fortune
fetch.bio: Hey Ladies… Fortune Here (But my friends just call me Handsome)

fetch.name: Turbo
fetch.bio: Hi, I'm Turbo, but don't let the name fool you! I'm currently accepting applications for the position of 'Permanent Human Companion'. My qualifications include: expert-level napping skills (especially on the couch), a strong work ethic when it comes to belly rubs, and a proven ability to make you laugh with my dramatic snorts and dramatic sighs. Dislikes include: sudden loud noises, riding in the car, being left out of the snack loop, and having my naps interrupted. Strengths: cuddles, loyalty, and a healthy appreciation for naps. I'm looking for a home with a comfy couch, a reliable source of treats, and a human who understands that sometimes, a dog just needs to be left alone (to nap, of course)."You can apply for me at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt

fetch.name: Sid
fetch.bio: Hello! My name is Sid and I'm currently in the market for a new best friend!! I love cuddles and hanging out with my people while we go on fun adventures. If it were up to me I would be glued to your side all the time.... However, I know that's not always possible, so when needed I'm perfectly happy to chill on my own in my kennel. I may be a bit picky about dog friends but I sure do love hanging out with people!In addition to cuddles and following you around the house, I also enjoy going on lots of outdoor adventures! Running around in the snow and going for long hikes are the best!! I also like playing training/mental stimulation games to wear me out when the weather doesn't allow for a lot of time outside. I learn fast and am eager to please my people, I just need a patient and gentle friend to teach me.So if you're also in the market for a new best friend to go on adventures with and then cuddle up with at the end of the day then I'm your guy and you should apply to adopt me today!!You can apply for me at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt

fetch.name: Egg
fetch.bio: Oh hi, my name is Egg and my foster mum says 'I'm a good Egg!" I have a bit of a hard shell to crack before I can trust you, but I've got a heart of gold in here that is fragile and ready for love. Okay, enough metaphor.I need some patience and time to get you know you, but I want love and to lick your hands and see what your doing. I'm a curious lil thing! Once I get spooked though, it takes a while to pick myself back up from the puddle I've melted into.I'm still new to this new life and I'm sure I'll settle more into myself in time, but I wanted to pop my cute little foxy face out and see if anyone would be interested in me!My foster loves Shibas but recommends people read up on the breed. We are notoriously stubborn, independent and my pal and I have already proven to be escape artists. But we are worth it!You can apply for me at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt

fetch.name: Jazzy
fetch.bio: Hey y'all...I'm Jazzy...aka "Jazzy Girl" or "Jazzy Butt." My life is so amazing now! This cool group of people rescued me, and my foster family has taught me so much! I came with a bum knee and had surgery in February to fix it. I really want to play with my new brother, but I am not allowed to run just yet. I was going in and out with my siblings to potty before the surgery just fine though. My Mom has to pick me up now as I can't go up or down steps yet either. It's only until the first week in May... so nothing permanent! We have been practicing walking on a leash. I much prefer to use a harness as pulling on my collar still scares me. I know that I will get the hang of it as I love to be outside. I love my doggy and kitty siblings! They are helping me learn how to be a real doggo and how to play with toys. I mostly like to play with a ball outside. I think I would like to have kids to play with also. I haven't been around many and would need a slow introduction, just to make sure though. Cuddling with my foster Mom is the best! She lets me sleep with her sometimes, but I don't mind my crate overnight either. That's where I hang out when she is gone. I like to pull the stuffing out of my sister's bed when left to my own devices, so smart move on her part! I truly am the sweetest fluffball ever!! Give me a chance and you WILL find out!!You can apply for this pup at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt

fetch.name: Walter
fetch.bio: Hey! I’m Walter! I’ve been with Fetch for awhile now, and I’m STILL looking for my forever family. Let me reintroduce myself: I’m a happy boy who likes to be a part of what’s going on. Whether we’re making dinner, you’re showering, or doing laundry - doesn’t matter to me as long as we’re together. I can supervise any project you got goin on! I am always excited to show you what I have. I am kennel/crate trained and I know to do my business outside! I’m strong, like you can tell I work out and all that. I know how to walk nicely on a leash but sometimes I seriously forget it’s even attached, this nose of mine is soooo powerful it’s crazy. I am special, my foster mom says it all the time. Just to make sure I get enough love and attention, it would be best if I am the only “good boy” in my forever home. I run like a graceful rhino and my white hair is so silky soft you won’t be able to resist loving on me. I have gotten myself into a couple situations and I really want to leave my troubled past behind me and move forward with people who get me. People who know tell me that I need structure and leadership: if you let me be the pack leader, I will take advantage of that situation. I love training and learning, my foster mom is kick butt cool at it, she has lots more information for you since I am sooo special, so apply and let’s get this party started!

fetch.name: Daisy
fetch.bio: Hi, we're Daisy and Bella. We have found ourselves being surrendered to rescue because our parents had to go to assisted living. We were very well cared for and loved! Therfore, we would LOVE a home together if possible. We do well with older children, and we even have cats at our foster home! We like to play with our foster siblings and LOVE walks. We'd love a home where we can cuddle or chill on the couch with you. No worries leaving us at home, Daisy will even give you her biggest smile when you return! You can apply for us at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt

fetch.name: Frank fka Finch
fetch.bio: Hi, I’m Frank — and playing is my game! I absolutely love everyone I meet, whether they have two legs or four. Animals, humans… if you exist, I’m probably excited to be your friend!I live with a young pup and we play all day, every day. There’s also an older gentleman in the house who prefers his space—I respect that—and a middle-aged lady who plays with me sometimes. I’m really good at reading her cues, if I do say so myself.I don’t want to brag, but I do great in a kennel. I’ll sleep in there at night if you insist… but cuddling with you would be my top choice. Cuddles are one of my favorite things (second only to playtime, of course).I have pretty good recall, though I can be a bit dopey at times and could use some continued practice. My foster mom has an underground fence, and I’ve done an excellent job respecting it—I’ve never crossed the line!I greet strangers with open paws and a big heart. I especially love having kiddos around to play with and snuggle. One thing I’m still working on is leash walking. I just get so excited when I see new people and dogs that my enthusiasm sometimes takes over—but with a little training and patience, I know I’ll get there.If you’re looking for a loving, playful, happy-go-lucky companion who’s full of affection and joy, I might just be your guy. **Side note: Frank has been to the vet regarding his cherry eyes. At this time, the vet doesn’t recommend another surgery to fix them.You can apply for Frank at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue

fetch.name: Ireland
fetch.bio: Hi! I'm Ireland, a 7 year old Maltese recently released from a life of breeding and let me tell ya, this side of the grass is definitely greener! I love people and my foster families pups. Oh and toys? Those things are so cool! I also get the zoomies, so catch me if you can!Due to my breed and size, respectful older children are preferred. I would also love another dog in the home so I have someone to show me the ropes and to play with. I mean, house training is going great, but just relaxing, being a normal dog is something I gotta get use to! You can apply for this pup at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt

fetch.name: Bella
fetch.bio: Hi, we're Daisy and Bella. We have found ourselves being surrendered to rescue because our parents had to go to assisted living. We were very well cared for and loved! Therfore, we would LOVE a home together if possible. We do well with older children, and we even have cats at our foster home! We like to play with our foster siblings and LOVE walks. We'd love a home where we can cuddle or chill on the couch with you. No worries leaving us at home, Daisy will even give you her biggest smile when you return! You can apply for us at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt

fetch.name: Cookie
fetch.bio: Meet Cookie – Your Future Best Friend!Hi, I’m Cookie, and I’ve come such a long way since entering foster care! I’ve been working hard to learn all the things that make me the perfect companion—I’m fully potty trained, can do stairs like a pro, and have mastered the art of couch and bed snuggles.I absolutely adore my foster mom and hate being away from her, so I know I’ll form a strong bond with my forever family, too. I’m still learning to trust new people, and sometimes I clam up in unfamiliar situations—but I promise, if you believe in me like my foster mom does, I’ll show you my HUGE, dorky, lovable personality!I’m looking for a patient and understanding home that will continue helping me build confidence. In return, I’ll give you unconditional love, endless tail wags, and a lifetime of loyalty. Could you be the one to give me my happily ever after?Apply to adopt me today!You can apply for me at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt

fetch.name: Rowdy (fka Buddy)
fetch.bio: Hi, I’m Rowdy – The Snuggle King, Ice Cream Connoisseur, and Bone Bandit Extraordinaire

fetch.name: Bailey fka Quinn
fetch.bio: SQUIRREL! I mean oh hi, I’m Bailey!But oh boy, do I love treeing those little critters! If you have a big fenced yard for me, I would clear 'em out in less than 3 seconds - Guar-an-teed! And maybe we could play fetch and go for car rides and hikes and sniffaris (those are walks), then come home and snuggle up on the couch. I'm a great snuggler - I love being under the blanket and tucked in right next to my humans. I go on 2 sniffaris a day - my foster Mom says they're great for my active brain - she also said she's proud of how much my leash skills have improved in the last month, too! I thrive with a schedule and do great in my kennel, but my favorite thing to do is be with my humans - will you be my human?Oh, and I LOVE butt scritches - just so you know!I need slow intros to other dogs (and sometimes people), but I do great when I feel safe with my humans - I mean, we had a dozen new people over for Christmas, and I was a perfect lady! I'd be better with older kids, because the young ones are unpredictable and I prefer predictability. You can apply for this pup at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt

fetch.name: Niche
fetch.bio: Do you even look around at your family and think'Is someone missing?'Maybe there is a Shiba shaped hole in your heart?Well, you can fill that niche, with me - Niche!I'm a generally happy lady who enjoys sprinting in the snow and chasing my Shiba friends.I'm still learning to trust humans, but I find women much less intimidating. As much as Sir Foster insists he isn't gonna eat me, I just don't believe that to be true.Ms Foster gives good neck scratches, but I have to be in the mood for them.I don't mind my kennel and I think I like the car. But I love a quite corner to nap as well as some I door space to pace. I also enjoy hoarding my toys (socks and underwear are included in 'toys') in my bed.I'm still learning about being a dog. I have to practice being on a leash and being more social with humans. Once I trust you, I'll be a great pal!My fosters loves Shibas but recommend people read up on the breed. We are notoriously stubborn, independent and my sis and I have already proven to be escape artists. But we are worth it!You can apply for me at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt

fetch.name: Butterscotch
fetch.bio: Meet Butterscotch! Butterscotch is a sweet 20.2-pound hound mix with the perfect blend of cuddly and independent energy . She *loves* being snuggled and will happily curl up with you when it’s time to relax , but when she’s in the mood to play, she’s always excited to have a furry friend by her side . She enjoys a little “me time” now and then , but don’t be fooled—this girl also knows how to have fun! Crunchy treats are her absolute favorite , and she’s a big fan of car rides , making her a wonderful companion for adventures big or small. If you’re looking for a loving pup who can balance playtime, cuddles, and independence, Butterscotch might just be your perfect match You can apply for me at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt
